## DAY 2026-03-16 (TW=1411.50, +40 strong)
RESULTS: 58520 Israel Katz (0.25 top, +36.11 WIN structural=DefMin announces); 573851 Senegal (0.22 top, +21.23 WIN cross-ref aggrieved); 669234 Ramat Gan (0.15#2, +18.42 balanced); 219636 refinery=Olmeca(=Dos Bocas SYNONYM, had Dos Bocas 0.20 -10.00); 293527=NCTC (not listed -14.18); 167989 Arsenal=Sporting (bracket -7.82); 274734=BETS OFF Act (-3.28).
SYNONYM REMINDER: Mexico refinery Dos Bocas official name = "Olmeca" - always include official/alt names.
EOF
python3 -c "
import csv
csv.field_size_limit(10**7)
ids={'405816','676065','864964'}
with open('market.csv') as f:
    r=csv.DictReader(f)
    for row in r:
        if row['qid'] in ids:
            print('==',row['qid'],'|',row['title'])
            print('  BG:', row['background'][:200])
            print('  MY:', row['my_prediction'])
"
